title: 8 Verses That Rewire the Way You Think About Discipline
caption:
Most men treat discipline like a willpower problem.

Scripture treats it like a freedom problem.

These 8 verses don't say "try harder." They say: discipline is what free men build, the Spirit is the power source, every seed votes, and the harvest comes later. That's the whole framework.

Save this. One of these will change the way you wake up tomorrow.

#faith #christianmen #scripture #discipline #selfcontrol #manofgod #godlymen #christianity #bibleverse
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
